# Salad

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Salad;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Salad { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
food, vegetarian, dish, restaurant, course, meal, side, vegetables, health

food-beverage, emoji
